name: Freshdesk
tagline: Customer support software that's easy and affordable
description: Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support platform by Freshworks. It offers multi-channel support, automation, AI-powered bots, and a free plan that makes it popular with small and mid-size businesses.
cons: AI features limited on lower tiers
use_cases: You need a multi-channel helpdesk that handles email, social, and chat tickets but can't justify Zendesk's pricing
Your support team is just getting started and needs to be set up and handling tickets the same day without complex configuration
You want a genuinely capable free plan that supports unlimited agents before committing to paid tiers
Your team needs SLA policies and automation rules to route and prioritise tickets without custom development
